subcodes.first_line: ...You have written that you desire to assist the Orient-Occident Unity. Undoubtedly the Orient and the Occident must assist each other; especially in the question of the school of Tarbiat.
subcodes.first_line_orig: مرقوم نموده بودید که خدمتی بانجمن ارتباط شرق و غرب نمائید البته
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
